title: Color Theme - Switching theme while Phone is set to Light Theme
scenario: Color Theme switching does not apply immediately across all app screens when toggling between Follow Phone Theme, Light Theme, and Dark Theme on Poly Studio Mobile
steps: 1. Open Poly Studio Mobile app on a phone set to Light Mode.
2. Go to Home screen.
3. Tap the Account icon or menu to access Settings.
4. Navigate to Account → Settings → Color Theme.
5. Verify the default selection is 'Follow Phone Theme'.
6. Tap 'Dark Theme'.
7. Observe the Home screen immediately changes to dark mode.
8. Navigate to Device Settings (tap a connected device).
9. Verify Device Settings screen is displayed in dark mode.
10. Navigate to Audio Settings → ANC, Transparency Mode, Equalizer.
11. Verify all Audio Settings screens are in dark mode.
12. Navigate to Notifications screen.
13. Verify Notifications screen is in dark mode.
14. Open DFU screens (if applicable) and verify dark mode is applied.
15. Open Poly Lens Menu and verify dark mode is applied.
16. Open User Guides and verify dark mode is applied.
17. Open Onboarding screens (if accessible) and verify dark mode is applied.
18. Force close the app and reopen it.
19. Verify all screens (Home, Device Settings, Audio Settings, Notifications, DFU, Poly Lens Menu, User Guides, Onboardings) remain in dark mode.
20. Navigate back to Account → Settings → Color Theme and tap 'Light Theme'.
21. Verify all screens immediately switch to light mode.
22. Navigate back to Account → Settings → Color Theme and tap 'Follow Phone Theme'.
23. Verify all screens revert to the phone's light theme (since phone is in Light Mode).
24. Tap 'Follow Phone Theme' again while it is already selected.
25. Verify no change occurs (the app remains on the phone's light theme).
26. Tap 'Light Theme' again while it is already selected.
27. Verify no change occurs.
28. Tap 'Dark Theme' again while it is already selected.
29. Verify no change occurs.
expected: The selected color theme (Follow Phone Theme, Light Theme, or Dark Theme) is applied immediately across all app screens (Home, Device Settings, Audio Settings, Notifications, DFU screens, Poly Lens Menu, User Guides, Onboardings) and persists after app restart. Tapping the currently selected theme does nothing.
